markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce Madrona's talent support to GrowthX Labs and discuss their hiring plans and needs.](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs is rapidly scaling, with a unique "agency-like" model requiring high-volume hiring for client-facing roles](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Top recruiting priorities: Senior Technical Recruiter and Senior Go-to-Market Recruiter to manage high-volume hiring](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Madrona offers various talent resources, including resume distribution, compensation data, and amplification of key roles](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [GrowthX to leverage connections with other VC talent partners (e.g. Iconic, Greylock, Battery) for recruiter recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)

## Topics

### Madrona Talent Team Structure and Support

  - [3-person talent team supporting 130 portfolio companies](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [80% time spent on outbound talent scouting, 20% on responsive support for key hires](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Provide resources like compensation data, playbooks, and weekly executive resume distribution](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Can help amplify job postings and create targeted campaigns for special roles](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)

### GrowthX Labs Hiring Model and Needs

  - [Two-sided business: high-volume client-facing teams and lean, high-talent core team](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Currently receiving \~1000 applicants daily through various channels](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Using AI-powered screening to efficiently filter candidates](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Key hiring needs: Senior Technical Recruiter and Senior Go-to-Market Recruiter](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Seeking recruiters with experience in scaling (20-100 employees) and strong networking skills](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Location flexible, open to international talent](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)

### Leveraging VC Connections for Recruiting

  - [Current investors: Madrona, Iconic, Greylock, Battery](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Suggestion to reach out to Gia (Cole) and Jenny (Battery) for recruiter recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [Potential to leverage other VC talent partners for resources and candidate pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)

### Technical Hiring Strategy

  - [Recently hired Felipe (ex-Airbnb and Stripe) as Principal Engineer](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [Planning to hire ML engineers, researchers, and data scientists in the future](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Shannon to connect with Daniel (CTO) to discuss specific technical requirements and sourcing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)

### Compensation and HR Tools

  - [Currently using Carta for benchmarks](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
  - [Shannon to provide access to Pave for additional compensation data](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Shannon to send Bridget access to Madrona's Kota resources and Pave](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Shannon to introduce Bridget to Daniel (CTO) for technical hiring discussion](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=2372.0)
  - [Bridget to reach out to Gia and Jenny for recruiter recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [GrowthX to consider announcing Felipe's hire to attract more technical talent](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=2190.0)
  - [Shannon to keep an eye out for potential recruiter candidates](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [Bridget to follow up with Shannon on any specific needs or questions](https://fathom.video/share/VthVuPdxjdyt3FaSys8rL5K6uzxf8pdD?tab=summary&timestamp=2350.0)
